description: Durian IO is DiffPlug's Java 8-oriented fork and package split of Guava's I/O and hashing utilities, distributed as a standalone JVM jar. It provides byte and character source/sink abstractions, stream helpers, file and resource utilities, base encodings, hash functions, hash streams, and related support classes under the com.diffplug.common.io and com.diffplug.common.hash packages.
